accounts.tests package

Submodules

accounts.tests.base module

Shared fixtures for the retained account-flow tests.

class accounts.tests.base.AccountFlowBaseTestCase(methodName='runTest')[source]

Bases: TestCase

Shared fixtures and helpers for account-flow tests.

build_password_reset_confirm_url(user, token=None)[source]

Build the reset-confirm URL for the given user.

Django’s built-in password-reset confirm URL contains: 1. uidb64 - the user’s primary key encoded for safe use in a URL 2. token - Django’s stateless password-reset token

prime_password_reset_session(user)[source]

Prime Django’s reset-confirm session and return the redirected URL.

PasswordResetConfirmView first validates the incoming token and then redirects to the same view with an internal session marker. Posting to that redirected URL mirrors the real browser flow.

setUp()[source]

Hook method for setting up the test fixture before exercising it.

accounts.tests.test_roles module

Role and permission regression tests for the accounts app.

class accounts.tests.test_roles.RoleAndPermissionTests(methodName='runTest')[source]

Bases: AccountFlowBaseTestCase

Tests for retained role synchronisation and permission coverage.

test_user_save_keeps_role_group_membership_in_sync()[source]

Verify a plain User.save() call is enough to realign role groups.

Module contents

Account test package for The Daily Indaba.
